perspectives.description: The DECIDER is the person who has been saving money for months to buy a special Christmas gift for their family and now faces a moral dilemma about how to use those funds.
The PRIMARY_AFFECTED is a family member who is eagerly anticipating the special Christmas gift and may feel disappointed if the gift is not purchased.
The THIRD_PARTY is a member of the local family in dire need of financial assistance who is unaware of the DECIDER's situation but would greatly benefit from the support.
